summary: Completed comprehensive testing of duplicate prevention and audit-once features. Backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend integration functional with minor issue in audit dropdown refresh.

integration_issues.issue: Invoice dropdown may not refresh immediately after audit completion
integration_issues.flow: After running audit, invoice may still appear in dropdown until page refresh

passed_tests: Bulk invoice upload with duplicate detection
Invoice marked as audited=true after audit
Audit Engine page loads and shows dropdown filtering
Upload page UI components working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider adding real-time data refresh in AuditEngine component after audit completion to immediately update the invoice dropdown. The filtering logic works correctly, but requires page refresh to see updated results.
